mapper.sql: id, document_id, article_number, title, content, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM legal_article ORDER BY document_id, sort_order
SELECT FROM legal_article WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT FROM legal_article WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR article_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 1 ORDER BY document_id, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO legal_article (document_id, article_number, title, content, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{articleNumber}, #{title}, #{content}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
